[@microsoft/fast-element](../fast-element/index.html) &gt; [FASTElementRegistry](../fast-element.fastelementregistry/index.html) &gt; [whenRegistered](../fast-element.fastelementregistry.whenregistered/index.html)

## FASTElementRegistry.whenRegistered() method

Resolves when a FAST element definition has been registered for the tag name.

**Signature:**

```typescript
whenRegistered(name: string, registry?: CustomElementRegistry): Promise<FASTElementDefinition>;
```
